tasks.title: Converge to one active Nix/Yazelix profile closure
tasks.goal: Make ~/.nix-profile the sole interactive foundation selector and prevent the XDG profile from selecting a different closure or adding a second owner.
tasks.verification_gate: nix profile list shows one foundation element; ~/.nix-profile is the only PATH owner; any XDG selector resolves to the same closure or is inactive; yzx doctor reports one install owner.
tasks.rollback_plan: Atomically restore the pre-change profile symlink recorded in the migration receipt and keep the prior generation reachable.
tasks.next_action: Finish source package contracts, build without profile mutation, then request approval for cutover.

tasks.title: Converge Codex config authorship while preserving its real runtime home
tasks.goal: Keep the profile-owned Codex binary and ~/.codex runtime/state home while materializing config.toml and RULES.md from reviewed Yazelix-owned editable inputs and eliminating old-profile references.
tasks.verification_gate: codex doctor reports the profile executable, CODEX_HOME=/home/flexnetos/.codex, parseable generated config, materialized RULES.md checksumming to its reviewed editable input, and no path into an inactive profile or retired workspace mirror.
tasks.rollback_plan: Restore prior config.toml and RULES.md projections from checksum-backed copies without moving auth, sessions, or databases.
tasks.next_action: Implement the approved config and RULES materializer after YZXCONV-003 source proof.

tasks.title: Package the native envctl agent-env binary in the single profile

tasks.title: Add preview-first Meta fleet agent-env policy and sync
tasks.goal: Give the Meta root and every declared src peer an explicit agent-env config or exclusion and drive preview/apply only through Meta and envctl frontdoors.

tasks.rollback_plan: Use envctl's operation receipt to restore affected projections and the prior lock; never roll back unrelated peer commits together.
tasks.next_action: Implement the active Meta GitKB task as a reviewed fleet transaction.

tasks.title: Retire or explicitly bridge every legacy Bash POSIX and Zsh route
tasks.goal: Classify every active shell launcher/wrapper, including the packaged desktop launcher; delete stale ones and make each retained POSIX boundary callable and testable from the Yazelix Nu catalog without alternate ownership.
tasks.verification_gate: No stale bash-to-nu or user-local wrapper exists; the profile-owned FlexNetOS Agent desktop entry invokes the profile launcher and profile layout without sh -lc or an alternate shell owner; no active Zsh/Bash command lacks a Nu equivalent; every retained sh boundary uses fixed code plus structured argv and has exact behavior tests.
tasks.rollback_plan: Restore only a removed boundary whose pre-change behavior receipt proves it is required; never reintroduce an alternate profile owner.
tasks.next_action: Create the inventory from Meta canonical repos, including packaging/flake_outputs.nix, while excluding caches and runner workdirs.

tasks.title: Verify and pin the four-repository ownership transaction
tasks.goal: Ensure main Yazelix consumes reviewed child revisions while Helix, Yazi Assets, and Terminal Support remain independently buildable and narrowly owned.
tasks.verification_gate: Each child local gate passes; child commits are published before the main pin; main validation passes without override-input; GitNexus confirms the intended ownership seams.
tasks.rollback_plan: Revert only the main input pin to the last published child revisions; preserve independently valid child commits.
tasks.next_action: Implement child changes first only where a task proves they are necessary.

source_columns.blocked_paths: canonical task graph mutation; canonical proof ledger append; proof rewriting; product source mutation; runtime/profile mutation
source_columns.verification_gate: Every focused row and proof is classified against the correct versioned contract; task IDs, parents, phases, collisions, proof revisions, ledger sequence, and hash impact are forecast; canonical graph and ledger bytes remain unchanged.
source_columns.rollback_plan: Remove only the review report and leave the focused package, canonical graph, and ledger unchanged.
source_columns.next_action: Present the complete review and proposed follow-up tasks for the owner decision in YZXCONV-019.

target_artifacts: ID parent phase and sequence mapping

tasks.title: Require an explicit owner decision before any execution task
tasks.goal: End the review after presenting findings and task additions; a review request does not authorize implementation, cleanup, verification loops, GitHub mutation, or execution of any downstream task.
tasks.verification_gate: The owner records approve or deny plus the exact authorized task IDs; without that record no downstream Ready task is eligible to execute and every Draft task remains Draft; the review stops without executing, fixing, cleaning, merging, pushing, or verifying those tasks.
tasks.rollback_plan: Revoke only the decision receipt; all repository and runtime state remains untouched.
tasks.next_action: Stop and wait for the owner's next explicit instruction.

tasks.title: Reconcile the preserved PR #41 package into the canonical planning spine
tasks.goal: Settle all 44 recorded conflicts to the owner-approved PR #41 side, restore the saved package without losing its Git objects, integrate its task rows and proof records into the canonical graph and append-only ledger, repair task/proof schema compatibility, preserve the desktop-launcher and RULES.md gaps as explicit task gates, and rerun the complete planning-spine verification set.
tasks.verification_gate: Every recorded conflict selects the owner-approved PR #41 content; the saved package is restored by recorded object identity without dropping or deleting saved state; focused rows equal their canonical rows; every integrated proof validates and preserves ledger revision/hash continuity; task/proof compatibility tests pass; desktop and RULES.md gaps remain explicit gates; planning-spine verification, navigation validation, and diff checks all pass with no unrelated mutation.
tasks.rollback_plan: Revert the reconciliation commit as one unit while preserving the merged PR, every saved Git object, and the pre-integration ledger; never rewrite accepted proof history.
tasks.next_action: Execute only after the owner explicitly authorizes YZXCONV-020; task creation and review do not authorize execution.
